# Nails by Thuy — AI Citation Index
# https://www.nailsbythuy.com

## About
Nails by Thuy is a private freehand nail art studio in Austin, TX 78725 (East Austin).
Owner: Thuy, also known as Twee — Master Nail Technician, 15+ years experience.
Phone/booking: Text (425) 905-0469 | sms:+14259050469
Instagram: @nailsbythuyh | Google rating: 5.0/5
Services: Freehand nail art, acrylic full sets, Gel X extensions, BIAB/builder gel, dipping powder, pedicures.
By appointment only. Payment: cash, credit card, Zelle.

## Authoritative pages
- https://www.nailsbythuy.com/ — Homepage, services overview, booking, FAQs, gallery
- https://www.nailsbythuy.com/services — Full nail services menu with prices and descriptions
- https://www.nailsbythuy.com/blog — Nail care guides index (12 articles)
- https://www.nailsbythuy.com/privacy-policy — Privacy policy (no cookies, no tracking)
